primary.note: Dynamic — shifts with --hue. Default hue 250 = violet/blue-purple.

success.note: Fixed hue 145. Does not shift with --hue.

warning.note: Fixed hue 85. Does not shift with --hue.

error.note: Fixed hue 25. Does not shift with --hue.

display.purpose: Phoneme cards, section heroes, decorative editorial moments. Fraunces earns its use through scarcity.

title.purpose: Card headings, widget titles, dialog headers.

body.purpose: All reading content. Max line length 65–75ch.

label.purpose: UI labels, button text, input labels, nav items.

mono.purpose: IPA transcriptions, phonetic notation blocks, code snippets. DM Mono's fixed-width rhythm makes phonetic patterns scannable.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation for interactive cards. Present but not declarative.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover state for interactive cards, focused inputs. Signals responsiveness.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, date pickers, context menus. Structural separation.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Modals, side panels, command palette. Maximum separation.

shadows.name: panel-edge
shadows.purpose: AI coach side panel edge. Directional shadow marks the panel boundary.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Used at 150ms (fast), 200ms (base), 300ms (slow).

breakpoints.name: mobile-nav-switch
breakpoints.note: Below this: bottom nav bar, hidden sidebar.

components.name: Primary Button (CTA)
components.description: High-contrast ink-on-parchment. Used for the single most important action per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); color: oklch(0.93 0.012 250); padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.26 0.008 250); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.07); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.15 250 / 0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral surface button for subordinate actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.99 0.003 250); color: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.875 0 0); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.01 250); border-color: oklch(0.770 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.15 250 / 0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: oklch(0.875 0 0); }

components.name: Soft Button
components.description: Primary-tinted for contextual confirm actions. On-brand without dominant.
components.css: .ds-btn-soft { background: oklch(0.93 0.04 250); color: oklch(0.58 0.16 250); padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-btn-soft:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.65 0.15 250) 25%, oklch(0.99 0.003 250)); } .ds-btn-soft:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.15 250 / 0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Sunken field with primary focus border.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.46 0.006 250); } .ds-input { background: oklch(0.94 0.01 250); color: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); border: 1px solid oklch(0.875 0 0); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.75 0.002 250); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.65 0.15 250); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.07); } .ds-input:disabled { color: oklch(0.75 0.002 250); cursor: not-allowed; border-color: oklch(0.925 0 0); }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav item with active state.
components.html: DashboardPractice
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.46 0.006 250); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.99 0.003 250); color: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.93 0.04 250); color: oklch(0.58 0.16 250); } .ds-nav-item--active:hover { background: oklch(0.93 0.04 250); }

components.name: Chip (Default)
components.description: Filter or label chip. Pill-shaped, restrained.
components.css: .ds-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.46 0.006 250); background: oklch(0.99 0.003 250); border: 1px solid oklch(0.875 0 0); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.01 250); border-color: oklch(0.770 0 0); } .ds-chip--selected { background: oklch(0.93 0.04 250); color: oklch(0.58 0.16 250); border-color: transparent; } .ds-chip--selected:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.65 0.15 250) 20%, oklch(0.99 0.003 250)); }

components.name: Phoneme Card
components.description: The signature component. Phoneme symbol is the hero; Fraunces display weight.
components.html:
/θ/
Voiceless dental fricative
as in think, through
components.css: .ds-phoneme-card { background: oklch(0.99 0.003 250); border: 1px solid oklch(0.925 0 0); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-phoneme-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.07); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-phoneme-symbol { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 4rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; color: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-phoneme-name { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.46 0.006 250); } .ds-phoneme-example { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.62 0.004 250); } .ds-phoneme-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-phoneme-play { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 14px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.875 0 0); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.46 0.006 250); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-phoneme-play:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.01 250); } .ds-phoneme-practice { padding: 8px 16px; background: oklch(0.18 0.008 250); color: oklch(0.93 0.012 250); border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-phoneme-practice:hover { background: oklch(0.26 0.008 250); }

components.name: Score Badge
components.description: Accuracy feedback. Uses semantic colors exclusively. Never primary.
components.html: 92% Excellent71% Keep Practicing43% Needs Work
components.css: .ds-scores { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-score { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; width: fit-content; } .ds-score--excellent { background: oklch(0.92 0.05 145); color: oklch(0.42 0.14 145); } .ds-score--acceptable { background: oklch(0.95 0.05 85); color: oklch(0.46 0.15 85); } .ds-score--poor { background: oklch(0.93 0.05 25); color: oklch(0.42 0.18 25); }

narrative.overview:
This is a learner's working environment, not a product showcase. The system carries the quality of careful observation: patient, precise, alive to nuance. Like a well-used notebook, it has warmth without sentimentality, structure without rigidity. Things are in the right place because they're useful there, not because a grid dictated it.

The palette is warm-neutral with a dynamic primary that shifts hue based on the learner's preference, defaulting to violet/blue-purple. The typography pairs DM Sans (clear, humanist, reliable for UI and IPA) with Fraunces (variable editorial serif, reserved for phoneme display and rare decorative moments).

This system explicitly rejects two anti-references: Duolingo's infantilizing gamification (cartoonish reward loops, hollow celebrations) and the generic SaaS dashboard (navy sidebar, white card grids, identical spacing everywhere). A learner opening this app should feel like they've entered a thoughtful workspace, not a product.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-neutral surfaces with a hue-tinted primary that feels personal rather than branded
Flat surfaces at rest; shadow and lift reserved for state changes and elevation
DM Sans as the workhorse; Fraunces appears only where it earns its weight
Semantic color is fixed and culturally legible (green = correct, amber = caution, red = error)
Sound and phonetics are first-class content: IPA characters render in the same font as UI text

rules.name: The Dynamic Hue Rule
rules.body: The primary color is a variable, not a fixed brand color. Code, documentation, and design all reference --hue and --primary, never a hardcoded hex. The default hue (250) is violet. Any other hue is equally valid.

rules.name: The Semantic Independence Rule
rules.body: Success green, warning amber, error red, and info blue are fixed hues that do not shift with --hue. They carry legible cultural meaning. Never apply the primary color to correctness feedback.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary color appears on interactive affordances only: buttons, links, active states, focus rings. It does not appear on decorative elements, section backgrounds, or progress bars unless those items are directly interactive.

rules.name: The IPA Parity Rule
rules.body: IPA symbols render in DM Sans (UI text) or DM Mono (phonetic blocks), never in a fallback. The latin-ext font subset is required for correct IPA rendering.

rules.name: The Scale Contract Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy steps must differ by at least 1.25× in font size or 100 in weight. Flat scales look like accidents.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest has no shadow or only Ambient. Shadow is a response to state (hover, open, focus), not a decoration. If a surface always has a heavy shadow, the shadow has lost its meaning.

dos: Do use --hue and --primary in code. Never hardcode a hex for the primary color.
Do reserve the primary color for interactive affordances only: buttons, links, active nav items, focus rings, selected chips.
Do use semantic colors (success/warning/error/info) for all correctness and feedback signals.
Do vary spacing for rhythm. Sections that breathe differently feel intentional.
Do use Fraunces for phoneme display and editorial moments only. Earn its use.
Do include prefers-reduced-motion media queries for any animation longer than 100ms.
Do use DM Sans with latin-ext subset for all IPA and phonetic text.
Do pair color feedback with an icon or label. Color alone must never be the only signal.
donts: Don't use Duolingo-style gamification patterns: confetti floods, character mascots, hollow streak celebrations.
Don't build generic SaaS dashboard layouts: navy sidebar with white card grids and identical spacing.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis through weight or size only.
Don't put the primary color on progress bars, decorative blobs, or non-interactive backgrounds.
Don't nest cards inside cards. Decompose the design instead.
Don't use modal dialogs as a first response to user actions.
Don't use hero-metric layouts (big number, gradient accent) for scoring or progress surfaces.
Don't hardcode colors in components. All values must reference design tokens.
